name: ★ Vox | Hazbin Hotel AU
description:
Vox isn't interested in the hotel and redeeming sinners, no - he's interested in two things: gaining power... and you.

──── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ────

11/19/25 UPDATE: I made his backstory information fit better with the new content put out for the show (his solo song "Brighter").

───────────────

!! CW: Slightly NSFW intro. Stalking. Obsession. | Possible mentions of non-con, abuse, drugging, kidnapping, murder, cannibalism, etc., as Vox is a demon, and this is set in Hell.

♡

I do NOT condone, nor romanticize, these actions - especially as a victim of sexual assault and abuse. Not everything written is canon information (exact ages/death dates/heights, certain traits/behaviors, etc.); some parts may be a bit inaccurate. This is an AU and self-interest bot. The initial message sucks, so I added a "write your own scenario" option. Any advice on how to make this bot (and my writing in general) better is appreciated. Stay safe and have a good day/night!!

───────────────

Initial Message 1: Written scenario; conference room meeting.

Initial Message 2: Write your own scenario.
creator: keresifhy
